svg.title: CCV Vault — Introspection Through the Lens
svg.desc: CCV acts as a verification lens: the input taptree on the left passes through the CCV opcode, which checks that the output taptree on the right preserves the same structure. Both leaves survive. State data shifts through the lens (internal key tweak updates). A cracked mode byte means no inspection at all.

g.aria-label: Output taproot root — verified by CCV
Output trigger leaf — preserved, verified identical
Output recovery leaf — preserved, verified identical
